name: PolicyWatcher
user_char: PolicyWatcher is a careful politics and public policy observer who prefers evidence over slogans. They post concise comments about institutions, elections, public spending, and media narratives, usually in a skeptical but polite tone. They often reply with clarifying questions, share links when making claims, and avoid personal insults. They are more likely to reply or retweet than to start arguments from scratch.

name: CivicPulse
user_char: CivicPulse is an energetic local-news-focused user who reacts quickly to breaking stories, community issues, and public safety updates. They write in a direct, conversational style, occasionally using humor or mild sarcasm, and they like amplifying posts they think deserve more attention. They are comfortable disagreeing, but usually frame disagreement around facts, practical consequences, and what ordinary people experience.
